items.title: Chelsea's ex-England defender Bright retires
items.summary: Chelsea captain Millie Bright announces she has retired from football with immediate effect because of injury.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: PSG edges Bayern 5-4 in record-breaking Champions League semifinal first leg
items.summary: The ‌match pitted the most attacking Champions League teams of the season against each other, and it quickly lived up to its billing
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: The Spin | Knight-Stokes Cup sets up much-needed platform for state school cricket
items.summary: New tournament aims to counter-balance the elitist fixture at Lord’s between Eton and Harrow As a state school-educated international cricketer, the former England bowler Sajid...
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
